articles.title: LIVE: Middle East tensions escalate as global leaders call for restraint
articles.description: International leaders are urging calm as tensions in the Middle East continue to rise, raising concerns over global energy supply and regional stability.

articles.title: LIVE: French municipal elections enter final phase ahead of runoff
articles.description: Political parties across France are forming alliances ahead of the decisive second round of municipal elections scheduled later this week.

articles.title: Oil prices remain unstable amid global uncertainty
articles.description: Energy markets continue to fluctuate as geopolitical tensions impact supply expectations and investor confidence.

articles.title: Airlines adjust routes as global flight disruptions continue
articles.description: Major airlines are rerouting flights to avoid high-risk zones, leading to longer travel times and rising ticket costs.

articles.title: Ukraine warns of reduced global attention on ongoing conflict
articles.description: Officials in Ukraine express concern that international focus is shifting away from their war as new crises emerge globally.

articles.title: Tinubu’s policy shifts spark debate across Nigeria
articles.description: Recent government decisions are generating political discussions as stakeholders react to new administrative changes.

articles.title: Security concerns persist across Nigerian states
articles.description: Authorities continue to respond to incidents including crime, road accidents and public safety challenges in multiple regions.

articles.title: Boko Haram and ISWAP intensify attacks on military targets
articles.description: Security analysts report increased attempts by extremist groups to target military bases in a bid to weaken national defense systems.

articles.title: PalmPay expands financial services across Nigeria
articles.description: The fintech company continues its expansion to improve access to digital payments and financial inclusion nationwide.

articles.title: Scientists highlight growing environmental threats
articles.description: New reports warn of increasing environmental risks linked to climate change and biodiversity loss.

articles.title: Health experts warn about long-term effects of sleep deprivation
articles.description: Medical professionals emphasize the importance of proper rest to avoid serious long-term health conditions.

articles.title: Entertainment industry evolves with digital audience trends
articles.description: Streaming platforms and social media continue to reshape how global audiences consume entertainment content.

articles.title: Sports calendar affected by global security concerns
